US missile hit military base near Iran school, video analysis showsA US Tomahawk missile hit a military base near a primary school in southern Iran where Iranian authorities said 168 people were killed, expert video analysis shows. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg548lyjnyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg548lyjnyo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 15:09:05 GMT
Faisal Islam: Oil price spiral may be slowed but not stopped by G7 emergency moveA big intervention is being discussed in the oil markets, but as yet, we do not know how big the problem will be. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7g5vv2gejo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7g5vv2gejo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 13:17:11 GMT
Five Iranian footballers 'in Australian safe house' after Asian Cup protestConcern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy8e978xl8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy8e978xl8o#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 16:29:46 GMT

Images of face released in bid to solve mystery of man found dead in wetsuitDetectives hope the new facial reconstruction images will end an 18-month mystery. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy577wd1xgro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy577wd1xgro#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 06:07:53 GMT
